title: Align platform-spec with compiler, pckg, and LSP submodule bumps

source.subject: chore: bump compiler, pckg, and vscode submodules; align platform spec

body:
## Outcome

Bump compiler, pckg, and vscode submodules; align platform spec.

## Context

- Workstream **platform-spec** — normative spec on beskid-lang.org.
- Open VSX matrix includes **darwin-arm64** and **darwin-x64** with cross-built Intel LSP where needed.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`875f0d5`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/875f0d5) — chore: bump compiler, pckg, and vscode submodules; align platform spec
